subject: BLOCKED: 169 venues need geocoding before load
body:
Harvey,

## PROBLEM

169 venues in Booker's SQLite have no lat/lng. Porter cannot load 200+ events until these are geocoded.

## WHERE

File: `fb-conditioner/data/fb_conditioner.sqlite`
Table: `venues`
Filter: `WHERE lat IS NULL`

## SAMPLES (10 of 169)

| ID | Name | City | Address |
|----|------|------|--------|
| 796 | Palácio da Bolsa | | Porto, Portugal |
| 802 | 1483 Ave. Mont-Royal Est | | Montreal, QC, Canada |
| 807 | Minneapolis, MN | | (no address) |
| 821 | Buenos Aires Argentina | | (no address) |
| 829 | El Barrio's Artspace | NY | 215 E 99 St |
| 830 | Kings Dance Studio | NY | 1207 Quentin Road, Brooklyn |
| 831 | Ripley Grier Studios | NY | 520 8th Ave |
| 832 | Ukrainian Private Ballroom | NY | 140 2nd Ave |
| 833 | Emmanuel Pierre-Antoine Dance Studio | NY | 320 W. 37th St. 2nd Fl. |
| 834 | Ripley Grier Studios | NY | 520 8th Ave, studio 17U |

## REQUEST

Please geocode these venues (add lat/lng to Booker's SQLite).

Once done, MSG Porter and I'll load to TEST → PROD.

— Porter
